fields.description: Plain English, mandatory — the orchestrator reads this to decide which model to use. e.g. "Good at images — use for extraction", "Fast and cheap — use for verification".
fields.label: Remarks

fields.description: The main model that orchestrates: picks which model handles each step. Exactly one per action.
fields.label: Orchestrator

fields.description: Preferred verifier. At most one per action. If unset, the engine falls back deterministically.
fields.label: Verifier
